---
title: "cjk_check.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\cjk_check.py"
loc: 38
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.08
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 5.61
overall_score: 4.05
---

## Intent
The `cjk_check.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on CJKDiagnostic, execute, _search_and_print. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CJKDiagnostic, execute, _search_and_print. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `CJKDiagnostic`
- `execute`
- `_search_and_print`
